meaning: n.洪都拉斯(拉丁美洲国家)
examples: I am the foreign correspondent in Washington of La Tribuna newspaper of Honduras.
Honduras mahogany and quartersawn oak were the best.
Honduras has the highest homicide rate in the world, with 86 murders per 100, 000 people.
Yet, the US and the UK have not issued travel warnings for Honduras, El Salvador or Guatemala.
